author: aleabitoreddit
text: AI datacenter bandwidth is the bottleneck. Copper will struggle, optical interconnects and photonics matter. $AAOI $MRVL

author: aleabitoreddit
text: The real chokepoint may be InP substrates. If CPO adoption accelerates, materials suppliers like $AXTI could matter more than people think.

author: aleabitoreddit
text: Robotics is downstream of AI, sensors, actuators, power density, and edge inference. The supply chain will matter more than humanoid demos.

author: aleabitoreddit
text: I do not want the obvious winner only. I want the small misunderstood company sitting at the bottleneck of a massive adoption curve. $SIVE
